enforce_consumer_deletion.description: A boolean that indicates all registered consumers should be deregistered from the stream so that the stream can be destroyed without error.

kms_key_id.description: The GUID for the customer-managed KMS key to use for encryption.

name.description: A name to identify the stream. This is unique to the AWS account and region the Stream is created in

retention_period.description: Length of time data records are accessible after they are added to the stream.The maximum value of a stream's retention period is 8760 hours. Minimum value is 24.

validation.error_message: The retention_period value must be between 24-8760 hours.

shard_count.description: The number of shards that the stream will use

shard_level_metrics.description: A list of shard-level CloudWatch metrics which can be enabled for the stream.

stream_mode_details.description: Specifies the capacity mode of the stream.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the stream.

timeouts.type: object({create: optional(string), update: optional(string), delete: optional(string)})
